chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1837 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of CMA 7914/23 3.For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner at the very outset submits that since the case has been challaned in the subject FIR, for which instant petition has been filed for quashment, he intends to file application before the trial Court either under section 249-A or 265-K CrPC, as the case may be, for quashment of proceedings and the trial Court may be directed to decide such application expeditiously after considering entire material placed on record. Learned AAG and APG have no objection to it. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
